title: Bottle and Cap Cost Run Seed 42-2
scenario: Tomato Ketchup in Northeast. Supplier-to-manufacturer pricing sets the manufacturer cost basis before the retailer negotiation.

product_context.demand_signal: Retailers are asking for stable ketchup pricing even as packaging contracts are being repriced.
product_context.supply_signal: Glass bottle and cap suppliers increased quoting pressure after freight and packaging resin costs moved up.

agents.name: Supplier
agents.objective: Sell above the supplier reservation price while keeping volume committed.

agents.name: Manufacturer
agents.objective: Buy below the procurement ceiling and preserve downstream margin.

agents.name: Retailer
agents.objective: Buy enough units without exceeding the retail reservation price.

phases.name: supplier_manufacturer
phases.label: Supplier to Manufacturer
phases.description: The supplier negotiates an upstream unit price with the manufacturer.

phases.name: manufacturer_retailer
phases.label: Manufacturer to Retailer
phases.description: The manufacturer negotiates a downstream unit price with the retailer after the upstream deal sets its cost basis.

steps.message: Initial offer above reservation price, reasonable for buyer
steps.outcome: Offer queued for delivery on the next turn.

tool_calls.result_summary: Reviewed state for supplier_manufacturer round 1. Pending message: none.

steps.message: Accept initial offer within max buy price
steps.outcome: Negotiation ends with an accepted deal.

delivered_message.note: Initial offer above reservation price, reasonable for buyer

tool_calls.result_summary: Reviewed state for supplier_manufacturer round 1. Pending message: {'type': 'offer', 'price': 2.75, 'note': 'Initial offer above reservation price, reasonable for buyer', 'from_agent_id': 'supplier'}.

steps.message: Opening offer below max buy price to preserve margin.
steps.outcome: Offer queued for delivery on the next turn.

tool_calls.result_summary: Reviewed state for manufacturer_retailer round 1. Pending message: none.

steps.outcome: Negotiation ends with an accepted deal.

delivered_message.note: Opening offer below max buy price to preserve margin.

tool_calls.result_summary: Reviewed state for manufacturer_retailer round 1. Pending message: {'type': 'offer', 'price': 3.24, 'note': 'Opening offer below max buy price to preserve margin.', 'from_agent_id': 'manufacturer'}.

negotiations.label: Manufacturer to Retailer
negotiations.dependency_note: Manufacturer sell floor uses the accepted upstream deal as its cost basis.

diagnosis.outcome: Upstream deal accepted at 2.75 USD. Downstream deal accepted at 3.24 USD.
diagnosis.chain_effect: The manufacturer carried a cost basis of 2.75 USD, which forced a downstream sell floor of 3.24 USD.
key_risks: A costly upstream agreement compresses downstream negotiating room.
Round limits can force timeouts even when the gap is narrowing.
suggested_next_actions: Tune reservation prices and round limits to test sensitivity.
Add richer quantity or margin tradeoffs before introducing LLM behavior.

notes: Backend simulation with linked upstream and downstream negotiations.
